EnableEffectForge.Name: Enable Effect Forge interface
EnableEffectForge.Hint: Shows access to Effect Forge in the Items Directory. The Effect Engine and its API remain available.

EnableCriticalForge.Name: Enable Critical Forge
EnableCriticalForge.Hint: Enables Critical Forge integration with automatic critical attack detection, optional confirmation, automatic card draws, the diagnostic workbench, and confirmed effect application.

CriticalCardVisibility.Name: Critical Forge card visibility
CriticalCardVisibility.Hint: Determines who can see manually published Critical Forge cards in chat. GM Blind is the recommended default.

CriticalHitBehavior.Name: Critical hits
CriticalHitBehavior.Hint: Determines whether critical hits are ignored, require confirmation, or immediately draw a card.

CriticalFumbleBehavior.Name: Critical fumbles
CriticalFumbleBehavior.Hint: Determines whether critical fumbles are ignored, require confirmation, or immediately draw a card.

CriticalHitTrigger.Name: Critical hit trigger
CriticalHitTrigger.Hint: Trigger on every critical hit or only on a natural 20 that actually ends as a critical success.

CriticalFumbleTrigger.Name: Critical fumble trigger
CriticalFumbleTrigger.Hint: Trigger on every critical fumble or only on a natural 1 that actually ends as a critical failure.

CriticalCardProfile.Name: Card profile
CriticalCardProfile.Hint: Weights the tone and mechanical impact of drawn cards. Non-preferred cards remain possible, but appear less often.

CriticalCardCustomTone.Name: Preferred card tone
CriticalCardCustomTone.Hint: Used only by the custom card profile.

CriticalCardCustomImpact.Name: Preferred mechanical impact
CriticalCardCustomImpact.Hint: Used only by the custom card profile.

CriticalCardAllowRedraw.Name: Allow redraws
CriticalCardAllowRedraw.Hint: Allows a Gamemaster to replace a not-yet-applied Critical Card with another eligible card.

CriticalCardHistorySize.Name: Draw history size
CriticalCardHistorySize.Hint: Number of recently drawn cards that redraws try to avoid.

SpellCriticalHitBehavior.Name: Critical Spell Hits
SpellCriticalHitBehavior.Hint: How Critical Forge reacts to critical successes on spell attack rolls.

SpellCriticalFumbleBehavior.Name: Critical Spell Fumbles
SpellCriticalFumbleBehavior.Hint: How Critical Forge reacts to critical failures on spell attack rolls.

SpellCriticalHitTrigger.Name: Spell Hit Trigger
SpellCriticalHitTrigger.Hint: Whether every critical spell hit triggers, or only a natural 20 that ends as a critical success.

Choices.Natural: Only natural 20/1 with a critical final result

SpellCriticalFumbleTrigger.Name: Spell Fumble Trigger
SpellCriticalFumbleTrigger.Hint: Whether every critical spell fumble triggers, or only a natural 1 that ends as a critical failure.

Choices.Natural: Only natural 20/1 with a critical final result

SavingThrowCriticalSuccessBehavior.Name: Critical Saving Throw Successes
SavingThrowCriticalSuccessBehavior.Hint: How Critical Forge reacts to critically successful saving throws.

SavingThrowCriticalFailureBehavior.Name: Critical Saving Throw Failures
SavingThrowCriticalFailureBehavior.Hint: How Critical Forge reacts to critically failed saving throws.

SavingThrowCriticalSuccessTrigger.Name: Saving Throw Success Trigger
SavingThrowCriticalSuccessTrigger.Hint: Whether every critical success triggers, or only a natural 20 that ends as a critical success.

Choices.Natural: Only natural 20/1 with a critical final result

SavingThrowCriticalFailureTrigger.Name: Saving Throw Failure Trigger
SavingThrowCriticalFailureTrigger.Hint: Whether every critical failure triggers, or only a natural 1 that ends as a critical failure.

Choices.Natural: Only natural 20/1 with a critical final result

EffectForge.Title: Effect Forge
EffectForge.Intro: The Effect Engine is active. This initial interface is used to verify the architecture and API.
EffectForge.CompileSuccess: The example definition was translated into a PF2e Effect Item source.
EffectForge.TestIntro: Rudimentary test interface for the Effect Engine. The fields produce a real Effect Definition.
EffectForge.Name: Name
EffectForge.ConsoleHint: For diagnostics, the definition and compiled PF2e Item are also written to the browser console.
EffectForge.ComponentIntro: Component-based test interface for the Effect Engine.
EffectForge.ComponentsHint: Add any number of components and edit them independently.
EffectForge.PreviewEmpty: The Effect Definition appears here after validation.
EffectForge.CompiledEmpty: The PF2e Item appears here after compilation.
EffectForge.ImagePickerUnavailable: The file picker is unavailable in this Foundry version.
EffectForge.CustomSelectorHint: For specialized PF2e or module selectors. Verify the value with “Inspect Roll”.
EffectForge.RecoveryDCHint: Leave empty to use the regular PF2e recovery DC.
EffectForge.FastHealingHint: The target regains this amount at the beginning of its turn.
EffectForge.RegenerationHint: The target regenerates this amount at the beginning of its turn.
EffectForge.RegenerationDeactivatedByHint: Select at least one damage type. Use Ctrl or Cmd for multiple selections.
EffectForge.TemporaryHitPointsHint: Granted once when the effect is applied. Temporary Hit Points normally do not stack.
EffectForge.MovementHint: Positive values increase and negative values reduce the Speed. This component does not grant a movement type the actor does not already have.
EffectForge.BaseSpeedHint: Grants climb, burrow, fly, or swim as a new base Speed. Existing movement modifiers can then alter it.
EffectForge.UnmanagedRulesPreserved: {count} Rule Elements not supported by Effect Forge will be preserved unchanged when the Item is updated.
EffectForge.NoItemLoaded: No effect Item is loaded for updating.
EffectForge.DropEffectHere: Drop an effect here to edit it
EffectForge.DropEffectHint: Supports effects from the world, Actors, and compendiums.
EffectForge.DropUnsupportedDocument: Only Item documents can be dropped into Effect Forge.
EffectForge.DropOnlyEffectItems: The dropped Item is not a PF2e effect.
EffectForge.DropItemNotFound: The dropped effect could not be found or loaded.
EffectForge.ImportExportHint: Exports contain a portable package with the Effect Definition and preserved unmanaged Rule Elements. Importing opens a new, unsaved effect.

TransferErrors.InvalidJson: The selected data is not valid JSON.
TransferErrors.ObjectRequired: The imported JSON must contain an object.
TransferErrors.UnsupportedFormat: This JSON is not a supported Effect Forge export.
TransferErrors.UnsupportedFormatVersion: Export format version {actual} is unsupported. Version {expected} is required.
TransferErrors.MissingDefinition: The export package does not contain an Effect Definition.
TransferErrors.UnsupportedSchemaVersion: Schema version {actual} is unsupported. Version {expected} is required.
TransferErrors.InvalidUnmanagedRules: The preserved unmanaged Rule Elements have an invalid format.
TransferErrors.InvalidFile: No readable JSON file was selected.
TransferErrors.FileTooLarge: The selected file is too large. The maximum is {maximum} bytes.
TransferErrors.ValidationFailed: The imported Effect Definition is invalid. First issue: {code} ({count} errors).
TransferErrors.ExportValidationFailed: The effect is not valid yet and cannot be exported. First issue: {code} ({count} errors).
TransferErrors.ClipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable in this environment.

EffectForge.DiscardChangesPrompt: There are unsaved changes. Discard them?
EffectForge.CreateItemTooltip: Save as a new world Item
EffectForge.UpdateItemDisabledTooltip: Load an existing world Item first
EffectForge.ApplySelectedTooltip: Apply the effect to selected tokens
EffectForge.ApplySelectedDisabledTooltip: Select at least one token first
EffectForge.ExternalCommitHint: Validate the Effect Definition and return it to the card editor.
EffectForge.ExternalCommitted: The mechanical effect was returned to the Critical Card.
EffectForge.ExternalInvalid: The Effect Definition contains errors and cannot be returned yet.
EffectForge.ExternalModeHint: Edit the Critical Card’s mechanical effect. “Use for Card” returns the validated Effect Definition to the card editor.
EffectForge.ComponentDurationInheritanceHint: Without an individual duration, the global effect duration is inherited.
EffectForge.MultiDurationHint: Components with different durations are created as a linked set of PF2e Effect Items.

Notifications.GmOnly: Effect Forge is available to Gamemasters only.
Notifications.NotImplemented: This function is not implemented in the current release candidate.

Errors.DuplicateComponent: The component type is already registered: {type}
Errors.DurationSplit: The Effect Definition requires {count} PF2e Effect Items because its components have different durations.

ShakenNerves.Name: Shaken Nerves
ShakenNerves.Description: The target is frightened and mentally vulnerable.
ShakenNerves.PlainDescription: The target is frightened and mentally vulnerable.

Schema.DefinitionObject: The Effect Definition must be an object.
Schema.DurationValue: Duration value must be a non-negative number.
Schema.ComponentsRequired: The effect requires at least one component.
Schema.ComponentObject: The component must be an object.

Rules.FrightenedStatus: Frightened {frightenedValue} already applies a status penalty to this roll. The additional status penalty {modifierValue} normally has no effect while Frightened is at least as high.
Rules.FrightenedCircumstance: The circumstance penalty {modifierValue} can stack with the status penalty from Frightened {frightenedValue}.
Rules.SelectorFormat: Selector “{selector}” is invalid. Selectors must be lowercase kebab-case strings.
Rules.SelectorCustom: “{selector}” is a custom selector. Verify its behavior with “Inspect Roll”.
Rules.ConditionValueIgnored: The condition “{slug}” has no condition value. The supplied value {value} is ignored during compilation.
Rules.PersistentDamageDuplicateType: Multiple components deal persistent {damageType} damage. Instances of the same type normally do not stack; usually only the stronger one matters.
Rules.ResistanceDuplicateType: Multiple components grant resistance to “{resistanceType}”. Resistances of the same type normally do not add together; usually only the highest value matters.
Rules.WeaknessDuplicateType: Multiple components grant weakness to “{weaknessType}”. Weaknesses of the same type normally do not add together; usually only the highest value matters.
Rules.ImmunityDuplicateType: Multiple components grant immunity to “{immunityType}”. The repeated entry is redundant.
Rules.FastHealingMultipleSources: Multiple components grant fast healing. Verify how the sources should interact on the target; in many cases only the highest value is intended.
Rules.RegenerationMultipleSources: Multiple components grant regeneration. Verify their values and deactivation conditions; in many cases only one regeneration source is intended.
Rules.TemporaryHitPointsMultipleSources: Multiple components grant temporary Hit Points. They normally do not stack; compare component {firstComponent} ({firstValue}) with this value ({value}).
Rules.MovementOverlap: Component {firstComponent} and this component affect the same Speed with the same modifier type. Under the stacking rules, normally only the stronger bonus or penalty applies.
Rules.BaseSpeedDuplicateType: Multiple components grant the same movement mode “{movementType}”. Usually only one base Speed of that type should be defined.

Compatibility.TargetPresent: Target analysis was prepared for “{targetName}”. Concrete immunity checks will follow in a later version.

PersistentDamage.FormulaMissing: Persistent damage requires a damage formula, such as 1d6.
PersistentDamage.TypeInvalid: “{damageType}” is not a known PF2e damage type.
PersistentDamage.DcInvalid: The recovery DC must be empty or a positive integer.

Resistance.TypeInvalid: “{resistanceType}” is not a known PF2e resistance type.
Resistance.ValueInvalid: The resistance value must be a positive integer.

Weakness.TypeInvalid: “{weaknessType}” is not a known PF2e weakness type.
Weakness.ValueInvalid: The weakness value must be a positive integer.

Immunity.TypeInvalid: “{immunityType}” is not a known PF2e immunity type.

FastHealing.ValueInvalid: The fast healing value must be a positive integer.

Regeneration.ValueInvalid: The regeneration value must be a positive integer.
Regeneration.DeactivationRequired: Regeneration requires at least one damage type that deactivates it.
Regeneration.TypeInvalid: “{damageType}” is not a known PF2e damage type and cannot deactivate regeneration.
Regeneration.DuplicateType: Damage type “{damageType}” is listed more than once as a deactivation condition.

TemporaryHitPoints.ValueInvalid: The temporary Hit Points value must be a positive integer. Received: {value}.

Movement.TypeInvalid: “{movementType}” is not a supported movement type.
Movement.ValueInvalid: The movement value must be a non-zero integer.
Movement.ModifierTypeInvalid: “{modifierType}” is not a supported movement modifier type.
Movement.UnusualIncrement: The movement change {value} does not use the usual 5-foot increment.

BaseSpeed.TypeInvalid: “{movementType}” cannot be granted as a base Speed.
BaseSpeed.ValueInvalid: The base Speed must be a positive integer.
BaseSpeed.UnusualIncrement: The base Speed {value} does not use the usual 5-foot increment.

Core.Title: Critical Forge Core Pack
Core.Description: Balanced test library for critical attacks, spell attacks, and saving throws.

DeepCut.Title: Deep Cut
DeepCut.Description: The blade opens a wound that refuses to close.

Hamstrung.Title: Hamstrung
Hamstrung.Description: The slash bites into the leg and steals the target’s sure footing.

TornGuard.Title: Torn Guard
TornGuard.Description: The blade tears protection and posture apart.

NumbedArm.Title: Numbed Arm
NumbedArm.Description: The hit leaves the weapon arm numb and heavy.

BloodInEyes.Title: Blood in the Eyes
BloodInEyes.Description: Blood runs into the eyes and turns clear sight into red streaks.

ArmorRent.Title: Armor Rent
ArmorRent.Description: The cut opens a dangerous gap in the target’s protection.

FlourishOfSteel.Title: Flourish of Steel
FlourishOfSteel.Description: The hit ends in a motion so flawless that even the dust seems to applaud.

SeveredStrap.Title: Severed Strap
SeveredStrap.Description: A severed strap catches exactly where it will hinder the next step.

Puncture.Title: Puncture
Puncture.Description: The point leaves a narrow but stubbornly bleeding wound.

PinnedStep.Title: Pinned Step
PinnedStep.Description: The point catches foot or hem and nearly nails the next step in place.

NerveStrike.Title: Nerve Strike
NerveStrike.Description: A precise thrust catches a nerve, turning movement unsteady.

BreathStolen.Title: Breath Stolen
BreathStolen.Description: The thrust steals the target’s breath and one precious moment.

WeaponArm.Title: Weapon Arm
WeaponArm.Description: The thrust forces the weapon arm into an awkward posture.

ExposedJoint.Title: Exposed Joint
ExposedJoint.Description: The point finds the seam where every following thrust hurts more.

NeedleThreaded.Title: Needle Threaded
NeedleThreaded.Description: The point passes armor, clothing, and dignity with the same astonishing precision.

StuckFast.Title: Stuck Fast
StuckFast.Description: For one embarrassingly long heartbeat, the weapon sits where it should not.

RingingBlow.Title: Ringing Blow
RingingBlow.Description: The impact turns the next heartbeat into thunder.

KnockedFlat.Title: Knocked Flat
KnockedFlat.Description: The impact takes away the target’s footing, direction, and remaining dignity.

RattledBones.Title: Rattled Bones
RattledBones.Description: The blow travels through bone and muscle and drains away strength.

Winded.Title: Winded
Winded.Description: The force drives the air from the chest, making every step laborious.

CrackedGuard.Title: Cracked Guard
CrackedGuard.Description: The hit makes protection and bone crack in the same note.

DizzyingImpact.Title: Dizzying Impact
DizzyingImpact.Description: The world needs a moment to stand still again.

BellRinger.Title: Bell Ringer
BellRinger.Description: A bell rings somewhere. Nobody has seen a bell.

BootScoot.Title: Boot Scoot
BootScoot.Description: The impact sends the target half a dance step in the wrong direction.

OffBalance.Title: Off Balance
OffBalance.Description: The hit tears the target out of its stance.

Opening.Title: Perfect Opening
Opening.Description: For one moment, every defense stands open like a badly closed door.

ShakenConfidence.Title: Shaken Confidence
ShakenConfidence.Description: The hit is so clean that the target doubts its own future.

Momentum.Title: Momentum
Momentum.Description: The perfect hit gives the attacker a brief surge of unshakable confidence.

SpectacularHit.Title: Spectacularly Unnecessary
SpectacularHit.Description: The hit looks far more expensive than it mechanically needs to be.

PerfectFollowThrough.Title: Perfect Follow-Through
PerfectFollowThrough.Description: The motion ends exactly where the next attack should begin.

Overextended.Title: Overextended
Overextended.Description: The failed attack leaves the attacker exposed.

WeaponJolt.Title: Weapon Jolt
WeaponJolt.Description: The miss sends a painful vibration through the attacker’s grip.

TangledFeet.Title: Tangled Feet
TangledFeet.Description: For one moment, the attacker chiefly defeats their own footwork.

OpenFlank.Title: Open Flank
OpenFlank.Description: The swing carries the guard away and leaves the side exposed.

WildSwing.Title: Wild Swing
WildSwing.Description: The attack pulls the body out of line and takes control with it.

GrandGesture.Title: Grand Gesture
GrandGesture.Description: The weapon traces an impressive arc that merely passes the foe.

BadRelease.Title: Bad Release
BadRelease.Description: The shot leaves a heartbeat too early and leaves the hand uncertain.

ExposedPosition.Title: Exposed Position
ExposedPosition.Description: While aiming, the shooter forgets that others can shoot back.

RecoilStumble.Title: Recoil Stumble
RecoilStumble.Description: Recoil and footing briefly disagree. The ground wins.

SightlineLost.Title: Sightline Lost
SightlineLost.Description: String, smoke, or sleeve crosses the sightline at exactly the wrong moment.

StringBurn.Title: String Burn
StringBurn.Description: The string hits something at least, unfortunately the shooter’s own arm.

ShakyAim.Title: Shaky Aim
ShakyAim.Description: After this miss, the sightline trembles like a nervous compass needle.

WrongFooted.Title: Wrong-Footed
WrongFooted.Description: The failed attempt ends one step farther than planned and in the wrong direction.

Rattled.Title: Rattled
Rattled.Description: The failure cuts deeper than expected and gnaws at courage for a moment.

LostTempo.Title: Lost Tempo
LostTempo.Description: The attack devours the fighter’s rhythm and leaves a gap in the next moment.

AudienceApproval.Title: Polite Applause
AudienceApproval.Description: Polite applause seems to come from somewhere. It was probably only a goblin.

MomentOfDoubt.Title: Moment of Doubt
MomentOfDoubt.Description: For one moment, every decision looks suspicious, especially the last one.

LuckyEscape.Title: Surely Intentional
LuckyEscape.Description: The attack misses so thoroughly that everyone briefly checks whether it was intentional.

LingeringFlame.Title: Lingering Flame
LingeringFlame.Description: The spell leaves hungry flames clinging to the target.

ArcanePrecision.Title: Arcane Precision
ArcanePrecision.Description: The flawless formula aligns the caster's next attack.

DivineRadiance.Title: Divine Radiance
DivineRadiance.Description: A trace of sacred power lingers around the caster as a protective halo.

OccultIntrusion.Title: Occult Intrusion
OccultIntrusion.Description: The spell slips behind thought and leaves the target's mind reeling.

PrimalSurge.Title: Primal Surge
PrimalSurge.Description: Wild power batters the target and drags at every movement.

ExcessiveSparkles.Title: Excessive Sparkles
ExcessiveSparkles.Description: The spell succeeds with enough visual flourish to require its own stage crew.

FrozenInstant.Title: Frozen Instant
FrozenInstant.Description: Cold closes around the target for one stolen heartbeat and breaks its rhythm.

CorrosiveOpening.Title: Corrosive Opening
CorrosiveOpening.Description: The magic eats open a vulnerable seam that remains exposed for a moment.

BlindingDischarge.Title: Blinding Discharge
BlindingDischarge.Description: The hit erupts in a white-hot flash that leaves stars dancing across the target's sight.

BrokenDefense.Title: Broken Defense
BrokenDefense.Description: The spell briefly unravels the target's magical and physical defenses.

HarmonicFocus.Title: Harmonic Focus
HarmonicFocus.Description: The flawless formula continues to resonate and sharpens the caster's next spell.

ProtectiveAfterglow.Title: Protective Afterglow
ProtectiveAfterglow.Description: Residual magic settles around the caster in a thin protective mantle.

ArcaneFeedback.Title: Arcane Feedback
ArcaneFeedback.Description: The failed spell snaps back through the caster's thoughts.

StaticFormula.Title: Static in the Formula
StaticFormula.Description: The arcane pattern remains noisy and unreliable for a moment.

FalteringFaith.Title: Faltering Faith
FalteringFaith.Description: For one breath, certainty gives way to doubt.

WhisperingBacklash.Title: Whispering Backlash
WhisperingBacklash.Description: Something on the far side of the spell whispers back.

PrimalRecoil.Title: Primal Recoil
PrimalRecoil.Description: Unruly magic kicks back with the enthusiasm of an offended aurochs.

SpectacularFizzle.Title: Spectacular Fizzle
SpectacularFizzle.Description: The spell produces one tiny spark and an entirely unreasonable amount of smoke.

TwistedGeometry.Title: Twisted Geometry
TwistedGeometry.Description: Space folds the wrong way around the caster and steals a fragment of the next moment.

ScorchedFocus.Title: Scorched Focus
ScorchedFocus.Description: Heat lashes back through the spell and leaves the caster's movements painfully uncertain.

FrozenGesture.Title: Frozen Gesture
FrozenGesture.Description: Cold locks into the caster's stance and drags at every step.

MentalEcho.Title: Mental Echo
MentalEcho.Description: The spell's final thought returns with teeth.

ReboundingGlare.Title: Rebounding Glare
ReboundingGlare.Description: The spell's brilliance reflects inward and fills the caster's sight with afterimages.

ApplauseSign.Title: Applause Sign
ApplauseSign.Description: The magic fails so theatrically that an invisible stagehand appears to be cueing applause.

ThroughTheGap.Title: Through the Gap
ThroughTheGap.Description: The creature slips through the effect and carries the momentum forward.

UnshakenBody.Title: Unshaken Body
UnshakenBody.Description: The body absorbs the assault and emerges harder to break.

UnbrokenMind.Title: Unbroken Mind
UnbrokenMind.Description: The will does not merely resist; it shuts the door and bars it.

TurnTheForce.Title: Turn the Force
TurnTheForce.Description: Defiance becomes momentum for the next decisive action.

DefensiveMomentum.Title: Defensive Momentum
DefensiveMomentum.Description: The perfect defense leaves the creature poised for the next threat.

Unimpressed.Title: Entirely Unimpressed
Unimpressed.Description: The effect arrives dramatically and receives the emotional response of a closed door.

PerfectFooting.Title: Perfect Footing
PerfectFooting.Description: The creature finds exactly the right place to stand and keeps that rhythm for the next threat.

IronPulse.Title: Iron Pulse
IronPulse.Description: The body answers the assault with a steadier, harder rhythm.

LucidDefiance.Title: Lucid Defiance
LucidDefiance.Description: The creature names the intrusion for what it is and refuses it entry.

BattleHardened.Title: Battle Hardened
BattleHardened.Description: The perfect defense turns pain into readiness against whatever comes next.

SecondWind.Title: Second Wind
SecondWind.Description: The creature emerges from the effect with a sudden pulse of recovery.

NotToday.Title: Not Today
NotToday.Description: The effect presents its credentials. The creature declines the appointment.

ThrownOffBalance.Title: Thrown Off Balance
ThrownOffBalance.Description: The effect catches every wrong movement and sends the creature sprawling.

SystemShock.Title: System Shock
SystemShock.Description: The body fails to contain the effect and turns violently against itself.

MindReels.Title: Mind Reels
MindReels.Description: Thought fractures under the full weight of the effect.

FullImpact.Title: Full Impact
FullImpact.Description: The creature catches the effect at precisely the worst possible angle.

Staggered.Title: Staggered
Staggered.Description: The full force of the effect steals a precious moment of action.

PainfullyObvious.Title: Painfully Obvious
PainfullyObvious.Description: No expert is required to determine that this went badly.

TangledRecovery.Title: Tangled Recovery
TangledRecovery.Description: The failed escape leaves every corrective movement a fraction too late.

DrainedReserves.Title: Drained Reserves
DrainedReserves.Description: The body spends too much strength resisting and has nothing left for the next effort.

EchoingDread.Title: Echoing Dread
EchoingDread.Description: The failed defense leaves the mind repeating the worst possible answer.

OpenDefense.Title: Open Defense
OpenDefense.Description: The creature commits so completely to the failed defense that its guard falls away.

MagicalSaturation.Title: Magical Saturation
MagicalSaturation.Description: The spell sinks too deeply into the creature and leaves it dangerously receptive to further magic.

WrongInstinct.Title: Every Wrong Instinct
WrongInstinct.Description: The creature dodges into it, braces against it, and somehow chooses the least helpful thought as well.

CriticalDiagnostic.OpenHint: Diagnostically analyze a PF2e chat message with Critical Forge
CriticalDiagnostic.DropMessageHint: Alternatively drag a PF2e roll message from chat into this area.
CriticalDiagnostic.DropNotMessage: The dropped document is not a chat message.
CriticalDiagnostic.DropUnresolved: The dropped chat message could not be loaded.
CriticalDiagnostic.NoTargetSelected: No target selected. Target traits will remain empty.
CriticalDiagnostic.OneTargetSelected: One target will be used for diagnostics:
CriticalDiagnostic.MultipleTargetsSelected: Multiple targets are selected. Diagnostics will not choose one automatically:
CriticalDiagnostic.NoMessages: No suitable PF2e roll messages were found.
CriticalDiagnostic.NoEligibleCards: No eligible card was found for this context.

Diagnostics.PF2E_CONTEXT_INPUT_INVALID: The input data is not a valid object.
Diagnostics.PF2E_CONTEXT_CATEGORY_UNRESOLVED: The message did not resolve to a supported critical-result category.
Diagnostics.PF2E_CONTEXT_OUTCOME_NOT_CRITICAL: The detected degree of success is not critical: {outcome}.
Diagnostics.PF2E_CONTEXT_ITEM_UNRESOLVED: The weapon or attack item could not be resolved.
Diagnostics.PF2E_CONTEXT_SOURCE_UNRESOLVED: The attacker could not be fully resolved.
Diagnostics.PF2E_CONTEXT_TARGET_UNRESOLVED: The target could not be fully resolved.
Diagnostics.CRITICAL_DIAGNOSTIC_MULTIPLE_TARGETS: There are {count} selected targets, so diagnostics will not choose one automatically.
Diagnostics.CRITICAL_DIAGNOSTIC_ITEM_RESOLUTION_FAIL: Attack item {uuid} could not be loaded from its UUID: {message}
Diagnostics.CRITICAL_DIAGNOSTIC_TARGET_NOT_SELECTED: No single target is selected; target traits and metadata remain empty.
Diagnostics.PF2E_CONTEXT_SAVE_TYPE_UNRESOLVED: The saving throw type could not be resolved.
Diagnostics.PF2E_CONTEXT_SPELL_UNRESOLVED: The message was classified as a spell attack, but the spell itself could not be fully resolved.

CriticalDiagnostic.WelcomeText: Select an existing PF2e roll message or drag one here from chat. The Forge shows what the adapter detected and which cards match. Eligible cards can then be deliberately published to chat.
CriticalDiagnostic.NoAutomationNotice: Diagnostics publish a chat card only after an explicit button press. An effect is also applied only after a separate Gamemaster confirmation.
CriticalDiagnostic.ReportCopied: The diagnostic report was copied to the clipboard.
CriticalDiagnostic.CopyFailed: The diagnostic report could not be copied.
CriticalDiagnostic.OpenFailed: Critical diagnostics could not be opened. See the console for details.
CriticalDiagnostic.NoRuntimeContext: No runtime snapshot is available for this analysis.
CriticalDiagnostic.ReplaySourceMissing: The source chat message is no longer available.
CriticalDiagnostic.NoHistory: No diagnostic reports have been recorded in this session.
CriticalDiagnostic.ExportFailed: The diagnostic report could not be exported.

CriticalPreview.CardUnavailable: The selected card is no longer available.
CriticalPreview.PublishFailed: The card could not be posted to chat.
CriticalPreview.NoMechanicalEffect: This card has no mechanical consequence.

Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_PREVIEW_MISSING: The Critical Forge data for this chat card is missing.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_EFFECT_MISSING: This card has no effect that can be applied.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_APPLY_GM_ONLY: Only a Gamemaster may apply this effect.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_ALREADY_APPLIED: This card effect has already been applied.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_APPLICATION_IN_PROGRESS: This effect is already being applied.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_TARGET_ROLE_INVALID: The card has an invalid effect target.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_TARGET_UNRESOLVED: The intended target could no longer be resolved.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_EFFECT_INVALID: The effect is invalid for the target and was not applied.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_APPLICATION_FAILED: The effect could not be applied. See the console for details.

Redraw.Success: A new eligible card was drawn.

Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_REDRAW_IN_PROGRESS: This card is already being redrawn.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_PREVIEW_MISSING: The Critical Forge data for this chat card is missing.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_REDRAW_GM_ONLY: Only a Gamemaster may redraw a card.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_REDRAW_DISABLED: Redrawing is disabled in the module settings.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_ALREADY_APPLIED: An applied card cannot be redrawn.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_REDRAW_NO_ALTERNATIVE: No other eligible card is available for this roll.
Errors.CRITICAL_CARD_REDRAW_FAILED: The card could not be redrawn. See the console for details.

criticalHit.Title: Critical Hit
criticalHit.Question: Draw a Critical Forge card for this critical hit?

criticalFumble.Title: Critical Fumble
criticalFumble.Question: Draw a Critical Forge card for this critical fumble?

spellCriticalHit.Title: Critical Spell Hit
spellCriticalHit.Question: Draw a Critical Forge card for this critical spell hit?

spellCriticalFumble.Title: Critical Spell Fumble
spellCriticalFumble.Question: Draw a Critical Forge card for this critical spell fumble?

savingThrowCriticalSuccess.Title: Critical Saving Throw Success
savingThrowCriticalSuccess.Question: Draw a Critical Forge card for this critically successful saving throw?

savingThrowCriticalFailure.Title: Critical Saving Throw Failure
savingThrowCriticalFailure.Question: Draw a Critical Forge card for this critically failed saving throw?

Errors.NoEligibleCard: Critical Forge found no eligible card for this roll.
Errors.Failed: Critical Forge could not process the critical roll. See the console for details.

CardEditor.OpenHint: Create, edit, import, and export custom Critical Forge card packs.
CardEditor.Title: Critical Forge Card Workshop
CardEditor.NoCards: This pack does not contain any cards yet.
CardEditor.SelectOrCreateCard: Select a card or create a new one.
CardEditor.FiltersHint: Separate multiple values with commas, semicolons, or line breaks. Empty fields do not restrict the card.
CardEditor.NoEffect: Narrative-only card without a mechanical effect.
CardEditor.ValidationFailed: The card pack contains errors and cannot be saved yet.
CardEditor.PackImported: Card pack with {count} cards was loaded. Save it to activate it in this world.
CardEditor.PackExported: Card pack was exported as a JSON file.
CardEditor.PackCopied: Card pack JSON was copied to the clipboard.
CardEditor.DeletePackPrompt: Really delete this editable card pack and all cards it contains?
CardEditor.DiscardPrompt: There are unsaved changes. Discard them?

ImportErrors.Empty: The clipboard or file is empty.
ImportErrors.InvalidJson: The file does not contain valid JSON.
ImportErrors.ObjectRequired: The imported JSON must contain an object.
ImportErrors.UnsupportedFormat: This card-pack format is not supported.
ImportErrors.UnsupportedVersion: This export-format version is not supported.
ImportErrors.InvalidFile: The selected file cannot be read.
ImportErrors.FileTooLarge: The import file is larger than 2 MB.
ImportErrors.NormalizationFailed: The card pack has an invalid structure.
ImportErrors.ValidationFailed: The card pack contains invalid cards or fields.
ImportErrors.Unknown: The card pack could not be imported.

ValidationCodes.CARD_PACK_NORMALIZATION_FAILED: The pack could not be normalized: {message}
ValidationCodes.CARD_PACK_DUPLICATE_CARD: Card ID “{cardId}” occurs more than once.
ValidationCodes.CARD_IDENTIFIER_INVALID: A card ID or pack assignment is invalid.
ValidationCodes.CARD_WEIGHT_INVALID: Draw weight must be greater than 0.
ValidationCodes.CARD_EFFECT_NAME_KEY_MISSING: The effect-name localization key is missing.
ValidationCodes.CARD_PACK_DECKS_INVALID: The pack deck definition is invalid.
ValidationCodes.CARD_PACK_DECK_CARD_ID_INVALID: Deck “{deckType}” contains an invalid card ID.
ValidationCodes.CARD_PACK_DECK_CARD_DUPLICATE: Card “{cardId}” is assigned to more than one deck.
ValidationCodes.CARD_PACK_DECK_CARD_MISSING: Card “{cardId}” is missing from the deck index.

CardEditor.ConditionsHint: Define when this card is available from its stored runtime context. Groups may be nested freely with AND and OR logic.
CardEditor.ConditionNoValue: This operator does not require a comparison value.
CardEditor.ConditionTestHint: Evaluate the current condition tree against an artificial, unsaved runtime context. Actor data and world state are not changed.
CardEditor.ConditionTestCardUnavailable: The card would not be available
CardEditor.NoConditions: This card has no context conditions and remains available like a classic card whenever its filters match.
CardEditor.EffectTargetSourceHint: The acting or saving actor. On successful saving throws, this is the beneficiary.
CardEditor.EffectTargetTargetHint: The attack target or the hostile origin of a saving throw.

ConditionModes.Any: At least one condition must match

ConditionWarnings.CARD_CONDITION_CONTRADICTION: Field “{field}” contains conditions in an AND group that may exclude one another.
